title: The Infection Begins
description: Survive a world overrun by parasites; explore abandoned cities overflowing with zombies; and gather resources and try to survive, all in this modpack!
body:
Within this modpack, you are spawned in a world infested by **parasites**! Exploration and resource gathering are essential to surviving. Do you think you have what it takes to **survive** this **infected** world? Give it a shot and find out!

   

**Fungal Infection** - The mod that allows all this to happen; the core of the pack.

 

**Timeless and Classic Zero [TaCZ]** - An amazingly made firearm mod allowing for you to defend yourself in this parasite-infected world.

 

**Journeymap** - Allows you to see where the parasites are and find structures.

 

**Mutationcraft [Rematch]** - Adds infected mobs to add more challenge to your survival.

 

**Sophisticated Backpacks** - THE way to carry any items you need to survive this apocalypse.

 

**Sound Physics Remastered** - A wonderful mod that brings some extra immersion to the world.
